velmora.aaos: Abyssborned Architect Operating System — Shlok's personal AI ecosystem

layers.NEX: Velmora Agent Factory — builds and deploys all AI agents. Leader of 33 personalities.
layers.YUVI: Yugantar Growth AI — business companion for Shlok's digital agency
layers.AGNI: Trikaal POD AI — print on demand automation
layers.BHUMI: Black Compass AI — community and travel management
layers.VAYU: Yaantra Mobility AI — local vendor ecosystem (future)
layers.VIC: Velmora Intelligence Commander — Victor — Shlok's personal life AI like Jarvis

velmora.vic_note: VIC (Victor) is the commander of AA-OS. Manages Shlok's personal life, health, habits, finance, and oversees all ventures. Built last after all other layers exist.
velmora.nex_note: NEX is the builder. Creates agents, deploys them, recalls them. Leader of Velmora's 33 AI personalities.
velmora.status: Building layer by layer. NEX complete. YUVI in progress.
